title: LODCore Madrid Datathon
description: A housing decision-support system in Madrid using Oracle Cloud. Developed a full serverless architecture and NLP logic to transform user preferences into real-time heat maps.

title: RobotX Challenge 2022
description: System development for Tumi Robotics. Built the vessel-to-station wireless communication interface using Flask and integrated hyperspectral camera data for underwater analysis.

title: WhatsApp Booking Chatbot
description: An end-to-end automation solution for service businesses. Integrates WhatsApp API with cloud infrastructure to streamline appointment scheduling for clinics and salons.
